verbGlossary.SEGMENTED BY: {source} record or metric is broken down by {target} attribute for cross-project comparative analysis
verbGlossary.MODELED FROM: {source} represents the physical scope defined by {target} dimension attribute
verbGlossary.COORDINATED ACROSS: Federated BIM model integrates discipline models from the number of trades reflected in {target}or count attribute
verbGlossary.VISUALIZES: {source} provides a visual representation of {target} duration attribute over time as a construction sequence
verbGlossary.SEQUENCED BY: {source} 4D simulation is organized according to {target}d construction attribute's work zones
verbGlossary.ESTIMATED FROM: {source} cost data produces {target} hard cost attribute through quantity-based estimation
verbGlossary.CALCULATED INTO: {source} cost quantities are divided by area to produce {target} attribute
verbGlossary.DELIVERED AT: {source} as-built model is handed over at the milestone defined by {target} completion attribute
verbGlossary.INFORMS: {source} output provides data that shapes {target} financial estimate
verbGlossary.EXTRACTED FROM: {source} quantities are used to calculate {target} dimension attribute
verbGlossary.REPRESENTS: {source} depicts {target} structural system attribute in 3D geometry
verbGlossary.PROGRESSED WITH: {source} level of development advances in alignment with {target} phase attribute
verbGlossary.GOVERNED BY: {source} deliverable requirements are dictated by the target delivery method's contractual BIM standards
verbGlossary.VALIDATED AGAINST: {source} properties are checked against {target} performance requirements
verbGlossary.REDUCES: {source} coordination effort decreases {target} issue density metric by resolving conflicts before construction
verbGlossary.CONCENTRATED IN: {source} detection findings cluster within {target} specialty system scope areas
verbGlossary.FLAGGED WITHIN: {source} coordination issue is identified within the scope of {target} specialty system attribute
verbGlossary.SCALED BY: {source} activity volume scales proportionally with {target} attribute (e.g., coordination meetings scale with subcontractor count)
verbGlossary.VERIFIED AGAINST: {source}capture data is compared to {target} completion attribute for progress verification
verbGlossary.CAPTURED FOR: {source}capture scan is performed because {target} scope attribute requires existing condition documentation
verbGlossary.DOCUMENTS: {source}record captures construction progress reflected by {target} completion attribute
verbGlossary.PRODUCED FROM: {source}-based drawing is generated from BIM data that satisfies {target} requirement attribute
verbGlossary.CORRELATED WITH: {source} coordination metric shows statistical relationship to {target} issue density attribute
verbGlossary.BENCHMARKED BY: {source} performance metric is compared across projects grouped by {target} to identify norms
verbGlossary.SCORED AGAINST: {source} adoption metric is evaluated relative to {target} BIM requirement attribute
